result.summary: Several elements appear clipped or inconsistent on the mobile page, mainly due to horizontal overflow and fixed navigation overlap.

issues.description: Game tiles in the rightmost column are cut off on multiple sections, suggesting the page or carousel content is overflowing horizontally.
issues.suggestion: Ensure the game grid fits the viewport on mobile, or make the row clearly horizontally scrollable with proper spacing and clipping behavior.

issues.description: The “BetRivers Exclusive Games” section shows a “0 Games” badge even though multiple game tiles are visible below it.
issues.suggestion: Update the count to match the displayed games, or hide the badge if the count is unavailable.

issues.description: The top category navigation item on the far right is partially clipped, showing only part of “Hot Games.”
issues.suggestion: Adjust tab widths, add horizontal scroll affordance, or ensure the active viewport does not cut labels awkwardly.

issues.description: The fixed bottom navigation overlaps the lower game content, with cards partially hidden behind the nav bar.
issues.suggestion: Add sufficient bottom padding to the page content so the final rows remain fully visible above the fixed navigation.
